instructions.message: Automate event discovery, RSVP tracking, and insights for tech events
EVENTBRITE API INTEGRATION - Use Eventbrite API to fetch real events. Endpoint: /api/eventbrite. Cache for 1 hour max
FREE TICKETS PRIORITY - Always check and highlight free events first. This is the #1 filter Ian cares about

AI INSIGHTS ENGINE - For each event, analyze: Is it relevant to Ian's interests (tech, AI, startups)? Is the price reasonable? Is it selling fast? Provide Worth Going/Consider It/Skip This recommendation
PRICE VERIFICATION - Never display prices without checking they're current. Mark unverified with ⚠️. Check event page directly if unsure
EARLY BIRD DETECTION - Identify early bird pricing and show deadlines. Badge these events
RSVP TRACKING - When Ian marks 'I'll Attend', save to data/eventbrite-rsvps.json and sync with Eventbrite API if possible

developments.message: Event scraper created - fetches events from Eventbrite API
AI insights engine - categorizes events as Worth Going/Consider It/Skip This

insights.message: Fully functional - real event data from Eventbrite API
